verdict.rationale: Two authoritative table sources disagree on the same Q2 2026 'New enterprise accounts' count: the operations review (authority rank 2) reports 43 (matching the claim) while the customer appendix (authority rank 3) reports 41, and no document explicitly supersedes, restates, or scopes one versus the other for this metric.
verdict.suggested_action: Reconcile the operations-review (43) and customer-appendix (41) figures for Q2 2026 new enterprise accounts with the data owner before asserting either value.

evidence.span_text: Vantage Industrial Group SE closed Q2 2026 with revenue of EUR 21.89 million and 43 new enterprise account wins.
